lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਨੇ ਨਾਉ ਸੋਈ ਜਿਣਿ ਜਾਸੀ ਆਪੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: mane naau soee jin jaasee aape saach drirraaeidaa |10|
lines.english: Whoever believes in the Name, wins; He Himself implants Truth within. ||10||
The seekers of Truth and goodness contemplate You.
I am the slave of Your slaves, O my Beloved.
The Truest of the True has the Truth is His lap.
The True Lord is pleased with those who love the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਸੋਝੀ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin sojhee kinai na hoee |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one understands Him.
Everyone calls Him the greatest of the great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਲਾ ਧਰਿ ਥਾਪੀ ਸਾਚੇ ਹੀ ਪਤੀਆਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: tribhavan saach kalaa dhar thaapee saache hee pateeaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Exerting His power, the Lord has established Truth throughout the three worlds; with Truth He is pleased. ||11||
Separated from the Primal Lord, they loudly weep and wail.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਾਏ ਨਾ ਵੀਛੁੜਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: saach milai so saache bhaae naa veechhurr dukh paaeidaa |12|
lines.english: The True Lord is pleased with those who merge in Truth; they are not separated again, and they do not suffer. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਮੇਲਿ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jis bakhase tis de vaddiaaee mel na pachhotaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: He blesses those whom He forgives with glorious greatness; united with Him, they do not regret or repent. ||13 |
They die and die, only to be reborn, when their time has passed.
| He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself is the Enjoyer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਮੁਕਤੀਸਰੁ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aape mukat daan mukateesar mamataa mohu chukaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: The Lord of liberation Himself grants liberation; He eradicates possessiveness and attachment. ||14||
He Himself is satisfied, and He Himself is liberated.
I consider Your gifts to be the most wonderful gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਕੀਤਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਕਰਣੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: kar kar vekhai keetaa apanaa karanee kaar karaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: Creating the creation, You gaze upon what You have created; You cause all to do their deeds. ||15||
You are the Cause of causes, Almighty Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਉਪਜਹਿ ਤੁਝ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tujh te upajeh tujh maeh samaaveh |
lines.english: They issue forth from You, and merge again into You.
They alone sing Your Glorious Praises, who are pleasing to You, O True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੨॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak saach kahai benantee mil saache sukh paaeidaa |16|2|14|
lines.english: Nanak offers this true prayer; meeting with the True Lord, peace is obtained. ||16||2||14||
Maaroo, First Mehl:
For endless eons, there was only utter darkness.
There was no earth or sky; there was only the infinite Command of His Hukam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਨ ਚੰਦੁ ਨ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਸੁੰਨ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa din rain na chand na sooraj sun samaadh lagaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: There was no day or night, no moon or sun; God sat in primal, profound Samaadhi. ||1||
There was no creation or destruction, no coming or going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣੀ ਨ ਬਾਣੀ ਪਉਣ ਨ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: khaanee na baanee paun na paanee |
lines.english: There were no sources of creation or powers of speech, no air or water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡ ਪਤਾਲ ਸਪਤ ਨਹੀ ਸਾਗਰ ਨਦੀ ਨ ਨੀਰੁ ਵਹਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khandd pataal sapat nahee saagar nadee na neer vahaaeidaa |2|
lines.english: There were no continents, nether regions, seven seas, rivers or flowing water. ||2||
There were no heavenly realms, earth or nether regions of the underworld.
There was no heaven or hell, no death or time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕੁ ਸੁਰਗੁ ਨਹੀ ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਆਇ ਨ ਜਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: narak surag nahee jaman maranaa naa ko aae na jaaeidaa |3|
lines.english: There was no hell or heaven, no birth or death, no coming or going in reincarnation. ||3||
There was no Brahma, Vishnu or Shiva.
No one was seen, except the One Lord.
There were no people of celibacy or charity; no one lived in the forests.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਜਨਮਾ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naar purakh nahee jaat na janamaa naa ko dukh sukh paaeidaa |4|
lines.english: There was no female or male, no social class or caste of birth; no one experienced pain or pleasure. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਨਾ ਬ੍ਰਤ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam naa brat poojaa |
lines.english: There was no chanting or meditation, no self-discipline, fasting or worship.
There were no Siddhas or seekers, no one living in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਜੰਗਮ ਭੇਖੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਥੁ ਕਹਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jogee jangam bhekh na koee naa ko naath kahaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: There were no Yogis, no wandering pilgrims, no religious robes; no one called himself the master. ||5||
There was no purification, no self-restraint, no malas of basil seeds.
No one spoke or talked in duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aape aap upaae vigasai aape keemat paaeidaa |6|
lines.english: He created Himself, and rejoiced; He evaluates Himself. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੰਤੁ ਮੰਤੁ ਪਾਖੰਡੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਵੰਸੁ ਵਜਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tant mant paakhandd na koee naa ko vans vajaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: There were no tantras, no mantras and no hypocrisy; no one played the flute. ||7||
There were no Gopis, no Krishna, no cows or cowherds.
There was no karma, no Dharma, no buzzing fly of Maya.
Social class and birth were not seen with any eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਜਾਲੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਮਾਥੈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਕਿਸੈ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: mamataa jaal kaal nahee maathai naa ko kisai dhiaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: There was no noose of attachment, no death inscribed upon the forehead; no one meditated on anything. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦੁ ਬਿੰਦੁ ਨਹੀ ਜੀਉ ਨ ਜਿੰਦੋ ॥
lines.translit: nind bind nahee jeeo na jindo |
lines.english: There was no slander, no seed, no soul and no life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਦਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਕੁਲ ਓਪਤਿ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਗਣਤ ਗਣਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naa tad giaan dhiaan kul opat naa ko ganat ganaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: There was no spiritual wisdom or meditation, no ancestry or creation, no reckoning of accounts. ||9||
There was no Gorakh and no Maachhindra.
